top_signals.title: Treasury Curve Flashes Higher-for-Longer Warning Under Warsh
top_signals.summary: A key Treasury yield gap has shrunk to its tightest level in a year as traders ramp up bets the Federal Reserve may keep interest rates higher for longer under new chairman Kevin Warsh.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Strategists Warn of High Yields Even If Iran War Ends
top_signals.summary: For all the hand-wringing over war-related inflation fears, there are signs that other drivers are having as much a bearing on longer-term borrowing costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin, crypto prices tick up as US-Iran peace deal odds climb
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: European stocks highest since March 2 as U.S.-Iran talks continue; euro zone bond yields drop on peace hopes
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Europe are tracking their Asian counterparts higher after Japan's Nikkei 225 breached 65,000 for the first time.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Congo rebels want to sell critical minerals to US: report
top_signals.summary: The rebels are hoping that Washington’s push to secure non-Chinese sources of critical minerals could translate into political legitimacy and economic support.
